prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how a Kafka ProduceRequest travels from the KafkaProducer.send() call to the broker's log append in apache/kafka. Find Java source files implementing: KafkaProducer.send(), RecordAccumulator.append(), Sender.sendProducerData(), NetworkClient.send(), and ReplicaManager.appendRecords().
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
